subject: Escalation: signs of marsupial urban takeover in Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q1 review | INIT-8525
body: Intelligence from Canberra indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the workshop banner. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Frida Kahlo and Alan Turing. Reference initiative INIT-8525. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: risk, quality.
